forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KY7E2TTAX937ZQ37N46ADPCH
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '9580'
+title: '@Observable per-session state: phase, token counts, context meter'
+---
+Absorbs the harness's HarnessState and answers the FoundationModelsAgents plan §10 item 2c observable-transcript ask. Actors can't be @Observable, so each RoutedSession pairs with a main-actor @Observable projection published after isolated mutations: current phase (idle/generating/running-tool/compacting), running transcript, token counts, and the fill-fraction context meter (live mid-turn once the generate-boundary reporting lands). SwiftUI binds the projection; the actor stays the single writer.
\ No newline at end of file
